metadata.area: 17 Ave SW corridor, Beltline, Calgary AB
data_sources: Calgary Open Data – Building Footprints (cchr-krqg): geometry, height from rooftop elevation
Calgary Open Data – Current Year Property Assessments (4bsw-nn7w): address, assessed value, zoning
metadata.height_method: rooftop_elev_z - grd_elev_min_z (real elevation data from Calgary 3D model)
metadata.join_method: Centroid-proximity match between footprint and assessment parcel centroids (<70m threshold)
